sections.content: This document specifies the business requirements for the Authentication System. The system shall provide secure user authentication and authorization capabilities for the enterprise application.

The system shall support the following authentication methods:

1. Username and password authentication
2. Multi-factor authentication (MFA) using SMS or authenticator apps
3. Single Sign-On (SSO) integration with enterprise identity providers

Session Management:
- Session timeout shall be 30 minutes of inactivity
- Users shall be able to extend their session before timeout
- Maximum session duration shall be 8 hours

Password Policy:
- Minimum length: 12 characters
- Must contain: uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and special characters
- Password history: Last 5 passwords cannot be reused
- Password expiration: 90 days
- Account lockout: 5 failed attempts, 30-minute lockout period

The system shall implement role-based access control (RBAC):

1. Users shall be assigned to one or more roles
2. Roles shall have defined permissions
3. Permissions shall be granular at the feature/function level
4. Administrative users shall be able to manage roles and permissions
